targets.boundary: Entire business, manufacturing supply chain, and product life cycle (company-wide value chain).
targets.notes: Apple plans to cut total scope 1–3 GHG emissions 75% from a 2015 baseline by 2030, with remaining emissions addressed via carbon removal.
targets.title: 75% reduction in total GHG emissions by 2030 vs 2015

targets.boundary: Entire business, manufacturing supply chain, and product life cycle (company-wide value chain).
targets.notes: Apple aims to achieve net zero scope 1, 2 and 3 GHG emissions by 2030 using deep reductions plus carbon removal for residual emissions.
targets.title: Net-zero GHG emissions across entire value chain by 2030

targets.boundary: Corporate operations worldwide (offices, retail stores, and data centers).
targets.notes: Apple targeted carbon neutral corporate operations by 2020 primarily via renewable energy procurement and offsetting.
targets.title: Carbon-neutral corporate operations by 2020

targets.boundary: Lifecycle emissions of all Apple products sold (materials, manufacturing, transport, use and end-of-life).
targets.notes: Apple plans for every product it sells to be carbon neutral across its lifecycle by 2030 using emissions reductions and carbon removal.
targets.title: All Apple products carbon neutral by 2030
